title: The Crew Splits Up
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the crew splits up, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Splits Up. Nami begins turning Usopp’s flawed invention into a weapon suited to her intelligence and weather sense. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're a stubborn girl, aren't you...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What point is there in running away?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You have no chance of winning, and no one's coming to help you.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you just sit still, I'll let you die a quick and painless death.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...Or do you intend to continue on with your little magic show?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've still got plenty of techniques left to showcase!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to hell with it! I'll just keep trying eve- rything until I find one that works!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My cheek is bleeding... this is it for me, isn't it... am I really going to die here...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, if I end up dying, I'm definitely gonna curse that useless, long-nosed sack of crap from beyond the grave!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why couldn't he have come up with something more useful for bait-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh? So you've resigned yourself to your fate?

summary: This part develops the crew splits up and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
